case_title: DON LOUDEN VS. JOSEPH LAWRENCE JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LOUDEN, DON AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, JOSEPH LAWRENCE JR., JOSEPH ESTATE OF LEONA LAWRENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-22-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DON LOUDEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH LAWRENCE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH LAWRENCE, JR. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESTATE OF LEONA LAWRENCE IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON ANY OF THE DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DON LOUDEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JOSEPH LAWRENCE JR. AND JOSESPH LAWRENCE JR. - ESTATE OF LEONA LAWRENCE ARE NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
